page_metadata.biotools__summary: RepExplore is a web-service for omics data analysis exploiting the information captured in the variance of technical replicates to provide more reliable and informative differential expression and abundance statistics, as well as low-dimensional data visualizations.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: RepExplore is a web-service for omics data analysis exploiting the information captured in the variance of technical replicates to provide more reliable and informative differential expression and abundance statistics, as well as low-dimensional data visualizations.
